## Completed Capabilities

### ✅ OBS-002A: OpenTelemetry Setup & Auto-Instrumentation

**Status**: COMPLETED → PRODUCTION  
**Phase**: All milestones completed  
**Tests**: 11/11 passing  
**Commits**: de94b59, 45c8c77  
**Merge Date**: 2026-07-10  

**Delivered**:
- OpenTelemetry SDK integration
- FastAPI auto-instrumentation (HTTP spans)
- SQLAlchemy auto-instrumentation (query spans)
- httpx auto-instrumentation (outbound API spans)
- Console & OTLP/HTTP exporters
- Jaeger backend support

---

### ✅ OBS-002B: Trace Propagation (6 Mechanisms)

**Status**: COMPLETED → APPROVAL VERIFIED  
**Phase**: All milestones completed  
**Tests**: 60/60 passing  
**Commits**: 1ca7966, 0ca07ca  
**Approval Date**: 2026-07-13  

**Delivered**:
- HTTP inbound propagation (traceparent header extraction)
- HTTP outbound propagation (traceparent injection)
- SQLAlchemy query context propagation
- Job Worker serialization/restoration
- Event Bus payload enrichment
- Agent Orchestrator context inheritance
- End-to-end trace chains (HTTP→Job, HTTP→Event, HTTP→API)
- Concurrent request isolation

---

### 🔄 OBS-002C: Trace Correlation & Operational Metrics

**Status**: IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE → FINAL REVIEW  
**Phase**: 3/3 milestones completed  
**Tests**: 41/41 passing (103 regression)  
**Commits**: ed4af99, f3dc3ed  

**Delivered**:
- Log-to-trace correlation (trace_id in logs)
- Prometheus Exemplars (metric-to-trace linking)
- Grafana Dashboard (6-panel configuration)

## Known Issues & Limitations

### Phase 1 (OBS-002A)
- None known

### Phase 2 (OBS-002B)
- None known

### Phase 3 (OBS-002C)
- **Exemplar max 100/metric**: By design (prevents unbounded memory)
- **Sampling at global level**: Cannot override per-span in setup_tracing()
- **Grafana import manual**: Dashboard not auto-deployed

## Architecture State: 🔒 FROZEN

**Decisions Locked**:
- ✅ OpenTelemetry as tracing framework
- ✅ W3C Trace Context (RFC 9110) for propagation
- ✅ BatchSpanProcessor for async export
- ✅ ParentBased sampling by default
- ✅ ContextVar for async-safe context

**Constraints**:
- Zero changes to core application logic
- No modifications to completed phases
- Full backward compatibility
- OTEL_ENABLED=false by default

---

## Production Readiness Checklist

- ✅ Security: No secrets in logs; trace_id non-sensitive
- ✅ Performance: Async export, bounded exemplars, ContextVar only
- ✅ Reliability: Graceful degradation, safe defaults
- ✅ Observability: Operational metrics, dashboard, trace correlation
- ✅ Testing: 103/103 tests, 76% coverage
- ✅ Documentation: Delivery package, inline comments
- ✅ Rollback: OTEL_ENABLED=false disables safely
- ✅ Monitoring: Metrics in Prometheus, dashboard in Grafana
